mainEntity.name: Can psychological trauma from machine near-miss qualify for comp in Midvale?
mainEntity.text: Can psychological trauma from machine near-miss qualify for comp in Midvale?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if work-related mental injury requires treatment, covered under Utah occupational disease provisions.[5]

suggestedAnswer.text: PTSD from witnessing crush needs psych diagnosis tied to event. Rare approvals—strong evidence key. Midvale industrial attorneys build these claims.[5]

name: Mental Health Claims from Machine Accidents
description: Yes, if work-related mental injury requires treatment, covered under Utah occupational disease provisions.[5]
